files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Added transformers param to Encoding.encode() only (signature, docstring, and a transform-apply block before allowed_special handling); did not touch encode_to_numpy/encode_with_unstable/other methods, so your return_positions work on those should be conflict-free, but check encode()'s signature/docstring for merge overlap
